stemHtml: In which of the following cases will ASDA, LDA, TODA and TORA have the same length?

options.a: Stopway and clearway are equal but no displaced threshold.
options.b: No stopway, no clearway, no displaced threshold.
options.c: Stopway and clearway equal and a displaced threshold is available.
options.d: No stopway but a clearway and a displaced threshold are available.
